title: openlabel-scenario-extraction
author: Garcia Fonseca, Mikel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This tool accepts as an input ASAM OpenLABEL files (automaticaly generated from SSD), converts them to RDF format and generates a graphDB following a given ontology. The graphDB is then queried to identify scenarios.
steps_raw: This tool accepts as an input ASAM OpenLABEL files (automaticaly generated from SSD), converts them to RDF format and generates a graphDB following a given ontology. The graphDB is then queried to identify scenarios.
